openings: I didn't expect this to be
If you truly appreciate music, this
connectors: the beat dynamic is just flawless.
it has a vibe that hooks you instantly.
conclusions: This is going to be a massive hit.
Give it a listen, it is totally worth it.

lyrics: Lost in the neon lights, chasing a ghost
Running through the shadows of what we loved most
The bassline drops and the world fades away
We are the rulers of the night until the day
Echoes of your voice inside a digital dream
Nothing in this city is quite what it seems
Hold on tight, the rhythm is taking control
A synthetic melody rewriting my soul
Walking all alone under the cold morning rain
Eyes locked together but we don't know the pain
Screaming to the void in a world full of noise
Searching for a sign, making all the wrong choice
Fire in our blood, ashes left in our hands
Dancing on the edge of these sinking sands
Staring at the stars from the twenty-third floor
If time is just money, I am craving for more
A guitar is weeping in a dead-end street bar
Trying to find out who we actually are
The clock keeps on ticking but everything stands
One last lonely verse written by these cold hands
